heading: Guest Lecture on Cloud Computing
content: An expert lecture on "Azure and AWS Cloud Services" will take place on May 20th in the Seminar Hall. Students are requested to bring their laptops for a demo session.

heading: Mini-Project Phase-1 Review
content: The first phase review of mini-projects for Section C will be held on May 22nd. Ensure your documentation is complete and signed by the mentor.

heading: Sports Meet Selection
content: Selection trials for the college cricket and football teams will be held this Saturday at 7:00 AM on the main ground.

heading: Elective Subject Selection
content: Students must select their elective subjects for the upcoming semester via the online portal by May 25th.

heading: Campus Cleanliness Drive
content: The Student Council is organizing a campus cleanliness drive this Sunday. Volunteers are requested to assemble near the main gate at 9:00 AM.
